Excellent stay for 4 days before flying to Dallas to watch England in the World Cup.
12 friends all stayed at the hotel.
-Cleaned room everyday
- a/c in room was excellent 
-great roof top bar
-great location
-lovely street restaurant and food was great.
- staff were polite, chilled and friendly.
Special mention for Shaun on reception who made our stay..very funny and friendly person. Helped us with any queries / advice we needed. We taught him some proper English phrases and traditions and eventually got him saying football not soccer! Thanks Shaun .. proper legend

I would give zero stars if I could. Do NOT stay at Hotel Henri NY. I was overcharged by more than $1,000, and after months of trying to get this corrected, I still have not received a refund.

I have contacted them repeatedly, and the lack of accountability is shocking. Management has completely refused to communicate with me—no callbacks, no real responses, nothing. It’s been months of being ignored over a very serious billing issue.

This isn’t just bad customer service—it feels outright dishonest. A hotel charging a guest an extra $1,000+ and then dodging them for months is unacceptable by any standard.

Save yourself the stress, time, and money—stay anywhere else. There are plenty of hotels in New York that actually treat their guests fairly. Based on my experience, this place cannot be trusted to handle even basic billing issues responsibly.
